sections.paragraph:
- Original: πάντοτε

- Transliteration: Pantote

- Phonetic: pan'-tot-eh

- Definition:

1. at all times, always, ever

- Origin: from G3956 and G3753

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Adverb

- Strong's: From G3956 and G3753; every when that is at all times: - always (-s) ever (-more).
